name: Little Tricky Prankster
author: Poki
description: Little Tricky Prankster is a sneaky pranking game where you have to find the right answers to the silly puzzles. In this newest installment of the Scary Teacher series, play as Scary Teacher's daughter and turn the whole town into your playground. Get ready with this prank game to be swept away in a whirlwind of jokes and chaos as you assist her through even more tricky choices, classic fun, and endless laughter! How to play Little Tricky Prankster? Click, tap or drag on the screen to interact. Who created Little Tricky Prankster? Little Tricky Prankster is created by ZnK Games. Play their other games on Poki: Scary Teacher PlayTime Adventure , Hide and Seek , Prankster 3D , Pull the String , Scary Little Prankster , School's Out , Scary Teacher 3D , and School Escape! ! How can I play Little Tricky Prankster for free? You can play Little Tricky Prankster for free on Poki. Can I play Little Tricky Prankster on mobile devices and desktop? Little Tricky Prankster can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
